name: @gonext/test-config
description: Shared Vitest + React Testing Library config and setup helpers for GoNext TypeScript packages. Provides a base Vitest config (jsdom env, coverage thresholds, globals) and a setup module that wires jest-dom matchers, fetch stubbing, and per-test cleanup. Consumed by apps/admin and shared React packages.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/test-config: source-only package, no build step'
